query:
INSERT INTO kms_key_activation_events (
                chain_id,
                block_hash,
                block_number,
                transaction_hash,
                key_id,
                key_content_sks_key,
                key_digest_server,
                key_digest_public,
                storage_urls
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, 1, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
